response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and relevant large-scale infrastructure experience, but fundamentally lacks the C++ expertise required for this role. The position explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming; his resume shows minimal C++ experience (brief stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a thesis project). His career trajectory over the past 5+ years has moved toward full-stack TypeScript/Node.js development, away from the systems-level work needed for cloud compute platform leadership.
strengths: Proven experience building large-scale distributed systems handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby with performance optimization expertise
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and demonstrated ability to establish engineering standards
Track record of technical mentorship through workshops, code katas, and successful open-source project leadership
concerns: Critical C++ expertise gap: only ~6 months of recent C++ experience versus required 8 years, with almost no activity in this language since 2015
Career trajectory moving away from systems and infrastructure work toward full-stack and product engineering over the past 5+ years
No demonstrated expertise in cloud compute platform technologies such as resource scheduling, orchestration, or compute architecture

key_factors.factor: Career focus on full-stack/product vs. infrastructure specialization
